[获取请求分片号][@partition_no]
  
  [记录日志][2][0][记录日志]["开始清理upbs_datadiff表内存数据库"]

  [事务处理结束]
  [记录日志][2][0][记录日志]["清理upbs_datadiff表内存数据库完成"]

  //只加载本分片的和全量回库的表数据
  sprintf(@sql_str, "select * from upbs_datadiff where partition_no = %d or partition_no = 0", @partition_no);

statements.raw: <A>[遍历记录池开始][upbs_datasync][enable_status = '1'][table_name = @table_name, dataload_type = @dataload_type, dataload_str = @dataload_str, data_source = @data_source, sql_str = @sql_str]
statements.name: 遍历记录池开始

statements.raw: //20250915 wangyq mod 支持按照表中配置sql加载数据 修改单：T202509133306
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from uses_fund_account a where a.partition_no = %d", @partition_no);
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from %s a where exists(select 1 from uses_fund_account b where b.client_id = a.client_id and b.partition_no = %d)", @table_name, @partition_no);
// 支持uses_serial_counter表按分片上场, 支持partition_no=0的基础数据上场
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from %s a where a.partition_no = %d or a.partition_no = 0", @table_name, @partition_no);

sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from %s a where exists (select 1 from uses_stock_holder b, uses_fund_account c where a.stock_account = b.stock_account and b.fund_account = c.fund_account and c.partition_no = %d)", @table_name, @partition_no);
//20240809 wangjh mod 支持uact_client按分片加载 修改单：T202408093630
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from %s a where exists(select 1 from uses_fund_account b where b.client_id = a.client_id  and b.partition_no = %d)", @table_name, @partition_no);
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from %s a,uses_fund_account b where a.fund_account = b.fund_account and b.partition_no = %d", @table_name, @partition_no);
//20231124 wangjie mod 序列回库改造
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from upbs_sequence a where a.ldp_short_appname = '%s'", @ldp_short_appname);
sprintf(@sql_str, "select a.* from %s a where a.ldp_short_appname = '%s'", @table_name, @ldp_short_appname);
// 配合数据二次加载改造，提前将二次上场功能号、上场字段送入ldp上下文
//20250101 yuemt mod 先调用SetMdbInitInfo将上场信息送入ldp上下文, 再调用因子异步加载 任务单： T202412306646
[记录日志][2][0][记录日志]["数据加载完成"]
